level_signals: 3+ years experience in project management, creative operations, or delivery
Explicitly described as an individual contributor role focused on execution, coordination, and operational reliability

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3+ years experience in project management, creative operations, or delivery within a SaaS, agency, or professional services environment
Comfortable with Automation Tooling an automation frameworks for streamlining and reporting processes ( Zapier, Workato, Notion)
Strong customer-facing communication skills with enterprise stakeholders
Demonstrated experience managing multiple concurrent workstreams
Familiar with the use of Salesforce, Omni for Tracking and reporting
High operational rigor with comfort using project management tools and reporting frameworks

scope.surface: Design delivery operations for enterprise projects — production planning, resource coordination, and workflow consistency
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS (AI video platform for enterprise)
primary_metrics_inferred: Resource utilisation and capacity reporting accuracy
Project status visibility and reporting accuracy
core_responsibilities: Coordinate the day-to-day execution of design projects
Build and maintain production schedules and timelines
Break down project scope into clear tasks and milestones
Track progress across all active projects and follow up on delays
Manage how design work is distributed across the team
Assign work based on availability, skillset, and project needs
Maintain visibility of individual and team workloads
Provide clear visibility into project status and performance
Report on delivery status, risks, and delays to Creative Design Leadership
Act as the coordination point for project updates and timelines

green_flags: Clearly scoped individual contributor role with explicit statement that it is not a people-manager position
Well-funded company (Series E, $4B valuation, $530M+ total funding) with strong investor backing
Fortune 100 customer base suggests enterprise credibility
Role responsibilities are concrete and specific — low ambiguity about day-to-day work
red_flags: Location not specified anywhere in the JD — unclear whether remote, hybrid, or onsite, and in which geography
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not mentioned
Posting dates not available — unclear how fresh this role is
Minor grammatical inconsistency in JD ('Comfortable with Automation Tooling an automation frameworks') may suggest a hastily written posting
